file_insights.purpose: Package initialization with app documentation and default config
Django TextChoices for notification classification and status
key_elements: NotificationType with 7 values (ORDER, SYSTEM, PROMOTION, PAYMENT, FEEDBACK, SECURITY, GENERAL)
NotificationStatus with 6 values (PENDING, SENT, DELIVERED, READ, ARCHIVED, FAILED)
NotificationPriority with 4 values (LOW, NORMAL, HIGH, URGENT)
NotificationChannel with 4 values (IN_APP, PUSH, EMAIL, SMS)
file_insights.pattern: Enum-based field choices with descriptive docstrings

file_insights.purpose: Core Notification model with comprehensive documentation
key_elements: Notification model inheriting from TimeStampedMixin and SoftDeleteMixin
UUID primary key for global uniqueness
Rich content support (title, message, action_url, image_url, data)
Manager with soft delete and organization filtering
Comprehensive model docstring with usage examples
file_insights.pattern: Full-featured model with lifecycle tracking and soft deletes

file_insights.purpose: Django admin customization for notification management
key_elements: Multi-level filtering (status, type, priority, channel, timestamps)
Rich search across title, message, user, organization
Color-coded status and priority display via format_html
file_insights.pattern: Production-grade admin interface with custom displays and actions

key_elements: ready() method with signal registration placeholder
file_insights.pattern: Standard Django app configuration with signal registration hook

patterns_discovered.name: Multi-Tenant Isolation
patterns_discovered.description: Every model includes organization FK and docstrings emphasize EVERY query must filter by organization_id

patterns_discovered.name: Soft Delete Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Models inherit from SoftDeleteMixin and manager filters deleted_at__isnull=True
patterns_discovered.impact: No permanent data loss, audit trail preserved

patterns_discovered.name: UUID Primary Keys
patterns_discovered.description: Global unique identifier for distributed systems

patterns_discovered.name: Comprehensive Status Tracking
patterns_discovered.description: Notification lifecycle with multiple timestamp fields (sent_at, delivered_at, read_at)
patterns_discovered.impact: Full visibility into notification delivery pipeline

patterns_discovered.name: Rich Admin Interface
patterns_discovered.description: Production-grade admin with color-coded displays, bulk actions, and advanced filtering
patterns_discovered.impact: Enables efficient notification management for support teams

patterns_discovered.name: Flexible Content Model
patterns_discovered.description: JSON fields (data, metadata) plus rich fields (action_url, image_url) for extensible notification content
locations: models.py: data, metadata, action_url, image_url fields
patterns_discovered.impact: Supports varied notification types without schema changes

patterns_discovered.name: Multi-Channel Support
patterns_discovered.description: NotificationChannel enum supporting IN_APP, PUSH, EMAIL, SMS
patterns_discovered.impact: Enables unified notification system across delivery mechanisms

patterns_discovered.name: Scheduling Capability
patterns_discovered.description: scheduled_for and expires_at fields for deferred and time-limited notifications
patterns_discovered.impact: Supports campaign scheduling and notification lifecycle management

gotchas_discovered.description: Docstrings explicitly warn that EVERY query MUST include organization filtering
gotchas_discovered.risk: Data leakage between tenants if queries don't filter by organization_id
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use custom manager with organization filter applied by default; code review enforcement

gotchas_discovered.description: Documentation states delete() should never be called directly, soft_delete() method required
gotchas_discovered.risk: Data loss if delete() is used instead of soft_delete()
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Override delete() method to raise exception; use custom manager

gotchas_discovered.description: title_display truncates to 50 chars - risk of misleading display
gotchas_discovered.risk: Admins may make decisions based on incomplete title information
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Hover tooltip or modal expansion for full title viewing

gotchas_discovered.description: apps.py ready() method has signal imports commented with 'Uncomment when signals module is created'
gotchas_discovered.risk: Signals may never be implemented or integrated properly
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Create signals module and uncomment before production deployment

gotchas_discovered.description: status_display and priority_display use hardcoded hex colors without centralized color scheme
gotchas_discovered.risk: Inconsistent colors across admin interface if Tailwind/CSS variables change
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use CSS class names instead of inline hex values

gotchas_discovered.description: scheduled_for, expires_at, sent_at have no clean() method validation
gotchas_discovered.risk: Invalid timestamp sequences (e.g., expires_at before scheduled_for)
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add model clean() method with validation rules

approach_outcome.description: Complete notifications Django app with Notification model and classification enums
deliverables_completed: Notifications app scaffolding with proper Django structure
Comprehensive Notification model with lifecycle tracking and soft deletes
Production-grade Django admin with color-coded displays and bulk actions
App configuration with signal registration placeholder
Extensive docstrings documenting critical multi-tenant rules

coverage.models: Complete with 13+ fields covering full notification lifecycle
coverage.choices: Complete with 4 enums covering all notification dimensions
coverage.admin: Complete with advanced filtering, display, and bulk actions
coverage.documentation: Exceptional with critical multi-tenant and soft-delete rules emphasized

approach_outcome.architectural_compliance: Follows project patterns for multi-tenant isolation, soft deletes, and UUID PKs

recommendations.recommendation: Implement organization filtering at QuerySet level
recommendations.rationale: Critical multi-tenant isolation rule needs enforcement, not just documentation
recommendations.implementation: Override default manager to apply organization filter automatically; use QuerySet.get_for_org()

recommendations.recommendation: Create signals module and uncomment signal registration in apps.py
recommendations.rationale: Signal imports are referenced as TODO but commented out, risking incomplete integration
recommendations.implementation: Create apps/notifications/signals.py with any signal handlers (e.g., auto-timestamping); uncomment in apps.py ready()

recommendations.recommendation: Add clean() method to Notification model for timestamp validation
recommendations.rationale: No validation on timestamp sequence (scheduled_for → expires_at → sent_at → delivered_at → read_at)
recommendations.implementation: Override clean() to validate: scheduled_for < expires_at, sent_at >= scheduled_for, read_at >= delivered_at, etc.

recommendations.recommendation: Replace hardcoded hex colors with CSS class names in admin display methods
recommendations.rationale: Maintainability and consistency across admin interface
recommendations.implementation: Create CSS classes in admin template; use format_html with class names instead of inline styles

recommendations.recommendation: Add tooltip or expandable display for truncated titles in admin list view
recommendations.rationale: 50-char truncation may hide important information admins need for decision-making
recommendations.implementation: Use title attribute, custom template tag, or modal expansion for full text viewing

recommendations.recommendation: Implement manager methods for common notification queries
recommendations.rationale: Frequent patterns (unread by user, by type, expiring soon) would benefit from reusable methods
recommendations.implementation: Add methods to NotificationManager: unread_for_user(), by_type(), expiring_soon(), failed_to_send()

recommendations.recommendation: Add database-level foreign key constraints validation in docstring
recommendations.rationale: Ensure clarity on cascading behavior for organization and user deletions
recommendations.implementation: Document on_delete behavior for user and organization FKs (likely CASCADE or PROTECT)

recommendations.recommendation: Create test fixtures for notification lifecycle testing
recommendations.rationale: Complex model with multiple statuses benefits from standardized test data
recommendations.implementation: Create factory fixtures covering all notification types and status transitions
